title: Implement a machinery management system
training_package_name: Agriculture, Horticulture and Conservation and Land Management Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Implement a machinery management system demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Establish machinery and equipment requirements

pcs.text: Identify machinery and equipment requirements of the workplace
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify machinery and equipment requirements of the workplace?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify machinery and equipment requirements of the workplace.

pcs.text: Evaluate applicability of alternative options to machinery ownership
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Evaluate applicability of alternative options to machinery ownership?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Evaluate applicability of alternative options to machinery ownership.

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify and address storage and housing requirements for machinery and equipment.

pcs.text: Monitor and assess machinery innovations for applicability to workplace requirements, safety and functions
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Monitor and assess machinery innovations for applicability to workplace requirements, safety and functions?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Monitor and assess machinery innovations for applicability to workplace requirements, safety and functions.

pcs.text: Maintain inventory of machinery and equipment according to workplace procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Maintain inventory of machinery and equipment according to workplace procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Maintain inventory of machinery and equipment according to workplace procedures.

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Develop criteria to select and monitor the provision of services according to workplace safety, operational and financial requirements.

pcs.text: Record and monitor agreements and transactions related to service provision for machinery operating requirements

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Record and monitor agreements and transactions related to service provision for machinery operating requirements.

elements.title: Manage machinery maintenance

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Establish maintenance schedules and systems for recording machinery use and maintenance.

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Monitor machinery maintenance to ensure adherence to schedules, operation and maintenance manuals, and manufacturer instructions.

elements.title: Manage machinery and equipment operation

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Develop and implement staff training program in the safe operation of machinery and procedures for machinery maintenance.
